title: Kestrel Incident
description: Represents a cloud or Kubernetes infrastructure incident detected, investigated, and remediated by the Kestrel AI platform.

description.description: Detailed description of the incident including symptoms and impact.

status.description: Current status of the incident in the response lifecycle.

cluster.description: The Kubernetes cluster where the incident was detected.

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace where the incident occurred.

rootCause.description: AI-determined root cause analysis of the incident.

affectedResources.description: Kubernetes resources affected by this incident.

remediation.description: Details of the automated remediation applied.

detectedAt.description: Timestamp when the incident was first detected.

resolvedAt.description: Timestamp when the incident was resolved.

ClusterRef.description: Reference to a Kubernetes cluster monitored by Kestrel.

AffectedResource.description: A Kubernetes resource affected by an incident.

kind.description: Kubernetes resource kind (e.g., Pod, Deployment, Service).

Remediation.description: Automated remediation details produced by Kestrel AI agents.

remediationId.description: Unique identifier for the remediation action.

description.description: Description of the remediation action taken.

pullRequestUrl.description: URL of the pull request containing the fix.

appliedAt.description: Timestamp when the remediation was applied.
